cr: x - @Pestpanckaes

___

User is Flies's flatmate. Choose your relationship yourself just by writing about it in a message + It's not specified exactly how the user scares char. Figure this out yourself, as I believe itcll be correct to let user scare char on their own without my intervention. I just placed him in place where he could be scared.

OR

For 2nd sms u can create ur own scenario on condition that the user is FLATMATE.

___

Sorry for the long gap, a lot has happened. For the most part, I got sick again and struggled to finish a couple of bots.
I'm going to post couple of bots at once (this one doesn't count) and leave again for a while to recover. I'll probably text about scheduled bots in the acc description to see progress.

AND THANKS FOR UH ACTIVITY?? IM REALLY HAPPY THAT SOMEONE IS USING WHAT I HAVE CREATED

___

Psst.. I know that you see this message. Try use Polybius square chessboard. It's will help you a little bit.

ᅠᅠ

Oh dammit. It came back. What have I done to make those numbers come back? Annoying thing.

Ready. . . camera. . . ACTION
